metadata.title: Sean E Bones | Tattoo Artist
metadata.description: Award-winning tattoo artist since 1999, trained under Troy "Rabbit" Fox. Internationally published, award winning art. Mansfield, TX — private studio, by appointment.

home.headline: Award winning tattooing, with decades in the trade
home.subheadline:
Sean E. Bones is an award-winning tattoo artist with over 25 years of professional experience in the industry. Since beginning his career in 1999, he has established a reputation for high-quality, technically proficient tattooing rooted in traditional apprenticeship standards.

Originally trained under respected artist Troy "Rabbit" Fox in Fort Worth and Duncanville, Texas, Sean has honed his craft across multiple states, including Texas, New Mexico, Missouri, and Kansas. His work has been internationally published and has earned recognition in competitive tattoo events.

Now based in Mansfield, Texas, Sean operates by appointment only, ensuring each client receives the time, focus, and attention their project deserves. He specializes in creating custom tattoos and welcomes consultations to discuss ideas, references, and design plans in detail.

Committed to professionalism and client satisfaction, Sean continues to deliver exceptional tattoo artistry in a private studio setting in Mansfield, TX.

booking.title: Book an Appointment
booking.description: Schedule a session and pay a studio deposit when required. If an embed does not load, use the direct links.
booking.openBookingTab: Open booking in a new tab
booking.depositBody: Use the secure link below to pay a deposit or balance your artist sent you (for example via Stripe or Square). You will complete checkout on the payment provider’s site.
booking.depositNote: Deposits are often non-refundable and hold your appointment time—see Policies for details.
booking.depositOptionalHint: To add a deposit button here, set Deposit / payment link in Sanity (Site Settings) or NEXT_PUBLIC_DEPOSIT_URL in your environment.
booking.emptyHelp: Add links so clients can book and pay deposits from this page.
booking.emptySanity: In Sanity Studio → Site Settings: set Booking URL (embed) and optionally Deposit / payment link.
booking.emptyEnv: Or set NEXT_PUBLIC_BOOKING_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_DEPOSIT_URL in .env.local / Vercel (then redeploy).

contact.title: Contact Sean
contact.description: Tell me about your idea, placement, size, and timeline.
